title: Keller Beach at Miller/Knox | East Bay Regional Park District
content: ## Keller Beach at Miller/Knox Regional Shoreline Water Quality Conditions. No lifeguards provided at shoreline beaches; swim at your own risk. Aerial photo of Keller Beach at Miller/Knox. Keller Beach is at the north end of Miller/Knox Regional Shoreline. There, visitors can wade and swim in San Francisco Bay. No lifeguards are on duty; swim at your own risk. ## Swim Beach Water Quality Program. The East Bay Regional Park District works with the Contra Costa County Environmental Health Department in accordance with California Department of Public Health's "Guidance for Salt Water Beaches" to determine water quality at Keller Beach. Our stop light sign is used to display the relative water quality from our latest bacteriological tests. **Water Quality Stop Light Designations:**. For more information, visit the Water Quality Stop Light Designations page or contact the East Bay Regional Park District Water Management Department at (510) 544-2328. # Keller Beach at Miller/Knox. ## Swimming and Water Safety Resources. ## Footer menu. ## Mobile Menu.

title: Keller Beach, Richmond, CA - California Beaches
content: # Keller Beach. Keller Beach  Keller Beach  Keller Beach  Keller Beach. ## About Keller Beach in Richmond, California. Keller Beach is a small sandy beach on the waterfront in Richmond, California. It’s in a park known as Miller/Knox Regional Shoreline and street parking spaces can be found along the southbound side of Dornan Drive just outside of the Ferry Point Tunnel. Benches and picnic tables are provided in the park near the beach. This beach has made the Beach Bummer List from HealTheBay.org which means it’s one of the 10 worst beaches in the entire state. Paradise Beach County Park is a nicely landscaped facility on San Pablo Bay near Tiburon, CA. ### Angel Island State Park – Quarry Beach. Quarry Beach is located on the east side of Angel Island State Park on San Francisco Bay near Tiburon.... ### Angel Island State Park – Perles Beach. Perles Beach is on the west side of Angel Island State Park on San Francisco Bay near Tiburon.

title: Keller Beach 🏖️ Richmond, CA
content: Love it! I still go there to meditate and find my young self. And exercise and cycle from there to Berkeley & back.
